author: suchihype
name: Record: 10L LeakyReLU + Gated Attention + Value Residual
blurb: Three orthogonal changes on top of PR #583's 10L baseline, each validated individually before combining: (1) LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP activation, (2) Gated Attention output gate (sigmoid, bias init +2), (3) Value Residual Learning (α init 0.9 blends per-block V with first-block V). 9-feature ablation kept only the 3 winners. No XSA, no EMA, no TTT, no n-gram cache.
